definition: 1. reduce degree intensity; 2. reduce amount or value
chinese: 減輕(程度或者強度)；減少(數量)，降低(價值)
example: This action would not have been sufficient to abate the odor nuisance.
Several members abstained from voting because of a conflict of interest.
Adversity and prosperity reveal one's breadth of mind; joy and anger test one's self-restraint.
More and more environmentalists advocate and use environmentally friendly unleaded petrol in cars.
In order to alleviate employment pressures, the nation has established a series of relevant policies.

definition: model of excellence or perfection of a kind; one having no equal
example: As difficult as it is to imagine, the apotheosis of Mark Zuckerberg’s career, many believe, is yet to come.
The portrait emphasizes the subject's aristocratic bearing and formal dress.
She worked assiduously to verify every citation in the report.
This medicine will assuage the pain.
He is apt to say atrocious things and to exaggerate his grievances.
Only an audacious mind will be able to solve this riddle.

definition: offensively self-assured or given to exercising usually unwarranted power
example: an autocratic person
The laboratory remained autonomous despite its partnership with the university.
If you berate me like that again, I will quit.
He is completely besotted with her.
The dictator gave a bombastic speech.
When you send a telegram, brevity is essential because you will be charged for every word.
The archive is brimming with letters that illuminate the author's early career.
The plant stores water in a bulbous stem during the dry season.

definition: 1. a standard or criterion; 2. the authentic works of a writer
example: I get that this game is a spin-off, but is the story canon?

chinese: (因為失敗、出糗而導致的)不安，焦慮
example: He often hastens physical intimacy, much to the chagrin of his dates.
Public chastisement only made the reluctant employee more defensive.
The witness insisted that the confession had been coerced.
Something that’s cogent is clear and persuasive.
They who dream by day are cognizant of many things which escape those who dream only by night.
To conciliate is to make peace with.

chinese: 專業的，有造詣的；無紕漏的，完美的
example: He is a consummate professional in his field.
I tried to close the discussions at noon, but my counterpart would not stop talking.

chinese: 非常懦弱的，因膽小而遭人鄙視的
example: The president is too craven to tackle this problem.
The scheme succeeded because it exploited the investors' credulousness.
The editor removed the derogatory remark from the final article.
From the ridge, the hikers could descry a cabin through the fog.
After repeated setbacks, the once-confident team became despondent.
Nothing could disabuse them of that preposterous notion.
Oleg's voice was too far away to discern what he was saying.

chinese: 令人不安的；令人困惑的
example: The sudden silence was more disconcerting than the earlier argument.
Dissemble all your griefs and discontents.
The official divulged the findings only after the review was complete.
His habit of annotating menus was a harmless eccentricity.

definition: deeply involved especially in something complicated
example: embroiled in the conflict
She is considered an eminent authority in the field of international law.
In this context, “encomium” refers to a formal expression of praise.
A lengthy debate ensued after the committee announced its proposal.
Restoring the bridge entails years of careful engineering work.
Residents entreated the council to preserve the historic market.

definition: commemorative text on tombstone or monument
example: The brief epitaph captures the poet's wit and humility.
he accepted their problems with composure and she with equanimity
New laboratory evidence may exonerate the wrongly accused technician.
This is going to sound completely fatuous, but it's my honest answer.
The passage describes its subject as fervid, meaning characterized by intense emotion.
Her prose is full of needlessly florid, cliched descriptions, securing her career as a romance novelist.
Our aim is to forestall all those risks.
The student glanced furtively at the clock during the lecture.
There is nothing which exacts a higher price than revenge, yet is so futile.

chinese: 囉嗦的，話多得令人厭煩的
example: Garrulous as he may have been, that old philosopher made some very poignant arguments about economics and society.
Don't you think that necklace is a bit gaudy?
The conservator gingerly lifted the fragile manuscript from its case.
The coach's motivational speech was a goad for the team's determination.
Reputable vendors do not gouge customers during an emergency.

definition: 1. enjoy the company; 2. group with others
example: Often we think that great leaders are those who are gregarious, always in the middle of a large group of people; yet, as Mahatma Gandhi and many others have shown us, leaders can often be introverted.
Researchers found that the disorder was hereditary rather than contagious.
The journal returned after a two-year publication hiatus.

chinese: 誇張的情緒表現；裝腔作勢
example: Her calm rebuttal ended the debate without unnecessary histrionics.
Her hortatory speech encouraged the volunteers to continue their work.
I could eat a horse, and that's not hyperbole.

definition: close in time; about to occur
example: The dark clouds and swirling wind indicated that a storm was imminent.
The father does not impugn her ability to be a good mother.
The reviewer incisively identified the argument's central weakness.

chinese: 不顯眼的；不引人注意的
example: The sensor is small enough to remain inconspicuous on the wall.

chinese: 土產的，本地的；與生俱來的，先天的
example: The area was inhabited for thousands of years by succeeding cultures of indigenous peoples.
The unfair accusation provoked widespread indignation among the researchers.

chinese: 愚笨的，荒謬的；不稱職的，無能力的
example: This cloth has the special ability to be invisible to the stupid and the inept.
The failed expedition passed into infamy because its leaders ignored repeated warnings.
We have taken part in the iniquity that will happen.
Lucy lay senseless on the ground, insensible of the wonderful deliverance which she had experienced.
He is a stubborn and intransigent demagogue.
The host jovially welcomed every guest at the door.
If you don't wear protective clothing, the sharp leaves will lacerate your skin.
The constitution protects individual liberty while permitting reasonable regulation.
He was converted from his licentious living.
Her loquacious new beau was there, talking everyone's heads off.
The essay's lucidity makes a difficult theory accessible.
The storylines in this series have got more and more ludicrous.
In a serious struggle there is no worse cruelty than to be magnanimous at an inopportune time.
The letter's minatory language warned of severe consequences.
You won’t mollify him with that explanation.

definition: swamp; complicated, confusing or troublesome situation
example: The simple dispute became a legal morass after several appeals.
These days, a smart phone with a good data plan can obviate the need for a land line.

definition: an elaborate representation of scenes from history etc.; usually involves a parade with rich costumes
chinese: 盛會、遊行、虛飾、露天表演
example: Do you know what the name of last year's beauty pageant winner is?
I'm suffering from pecuniary embarrassment.
A coward is someone who, in a perilous emergency, thinks with his legs.
Stop acting like a petulant child every time you don't get your way.
That, of course, would effectively preclude the underlying tombs ever being investigated archaeologically.
Repeated prevarication damaged the spokesperson's credibility.
The panel proclaimed the experiment a success after reviewing the data.

chinese: 有生殖力的、多產的、豐富的
example: a prolific writer

chinese: 容易有某種傾向的；俯臥的
example: Coastal roads are prone to flooding during severe storms.
From a very young age, he showed his propensity for studying.
Further procedural objections were merely protracting the negotiations.
She spoke in a querulous voice.
Minor quibbles should not obscure the proposal's broad merits.
Owing to the refractory nature of alumina it is with difficulty that it can be diffused in alkaline silicates, borates, or lead silicates.
Her concise rejoinder exposed the weakness of the criticism.

chinese: 有韌性的；能迅速復原的
example: The resilient ecosystem recovered quickly after the drought.
The loud sounds of sawing, drilling and scraping reverberate around the room.
Kaleidoscopic prints saturate my blank mind, creating vital memories and burning thoughts.
The novel asks whether an artificial intelligence could become sentient.

chinese: 催眠的藥劑，安眠藥；催眠的
example: The book I bought yesterday is a real soporific.
The argument that the platform exists only to promote written language seems spurious.

definition: spoke haltingly, with unintended pauses and repetitions
example: Surprised by the accusation, he stammered an incomplete reply.
The guard's stolidity concealed considerable anxiety.
The investigation was stymied by incomplete and contradictory records.
The crowd resumed its discussion after the noise subsided.
Jason was a taciturn individual, so it was always a real surprise when he said anything.
In terms of political change, a tirade oftentimes does little more than make the person speaking red in the face.
The historian's new tome examines three centuries of regional trade.

chinese: 缺乏興趣；(肉體或精神上的)遲鈍，懶散
example: In this context, “torpor” refers to a state of motor and mental inactivity with a partial suspension of sensibility.
It may not be easy, but this problem is tractable.
Public interest in the discovery continued unabated for months.

chinese: 無可爭辯的，無法否認的，不可褻瀆的
example: Being convinced of your own unassailable rationality is like being convinced of the solidity of a mirage.
The unassuming scientist rarely mentioned her many awards.
Undaunted by the initial rejection, the team revised its proposal.
The tenants vacated the building before repairs began.
The committee vacillated between caution and rapid reform.
The venerated scholar continued teaching well into retirement.
Readers experience the explorer's discoveries vicariously through her journals.
Several laboratories are vying to reproduce the surprising result.
Without a word, he had disappeared into the welter of the noonday crowd.
She shaped the cake into a whimsical design.
